error_signature: Slack bot does not respond to app mentions
title: Slack bot not responding to app mentions
symptom: The Slack bot does not respond when mentioned in a message, despite working with other triggers. The issue persists even after configuring the necessary settings.
applies_when: Using Slack bot with 'bot/app mention' trigger
All required OAuth scopes are added
not_this_if: Bot responds to 'new message posted on channel' trigger
root_cause: The Slack bot requires specific event subscriptions to respond to app mentions. If the 'app_mention' event is not subscribed or if the bot lacks necessary permissions, it will not trigger as expected.
fix_steps: Go to your Slack App dashboard and click on Event Subscriptions.
Reinstall the app to the workspace to activate the new event subscription.
Ensure the bot is invited to the channel where it should respond.
agent_instruction: Subscribe to the 'app_mention' event in Slack and reinstall the app.
